themes: NVIDIA SkillSpector scanning 26% of skills for vulnerabilities
apple/container v1.0 - 1VM-per-container architecture challenges Docker Desktop
Non-AI tools like kage and ponytail scoring higher on HN

frontend.react: React 19 Server Components + TanStack Query = dominant 2026 pattern. Bundle size -68%, LCP 2.1s->0.4s. Vercel 40+ a11y rules across 8 categories. Zustand selectors over destructuring.
frontend.nextjs: App Router default. Nested layouts + Server Components reduce client JS. Streaming + Suspense. Server Actions. Anti-pattern: overusing 'use client'.

backend.golang: Go remains infra language. Package boundaries key skill. Clean Architecture dominant. Bounded query params critical - unbounded ?include_details caused P99 spikes.
backend.python: Python 3.14 free-threaded. pyproject.toml+uv+Ruff+pytest standard. FastAPI dominant, Litestar emerging. Type hints non-negotiable.

architecture.ddd: Modular monoliths won (40K reversal cost). Event sourcing+CQRS. Saga choreography preferred. Strangler Fig safest migration.
architecture.event_driven: Kafka for throughput, NATS for latency. Schema Registry critical. Idempotent consumers + DLQs mandatory.

qa.testing: Shift from test execution to risk intelligence. AI-assisted test generation. Contract testing essential. QAOps integrates QA into CI/CD.

devops.cicd: Container-native workflows. DevSecOps norm. GitOps with Argo CD/Flux. Platform engineering building IDPs.
devops.iac: 100% infra through code review. Modular Terraform. S3+DynamoDB state. Daily drift detection.

sre.reliability: AI-assisted toil reduction. Telemetry budgeting. Cap metric cardinality. 38% orgs lack formal incident response.

security.threat_modeling: Critical CVEs: Windows Kernel RCE (CVSS 9.8), FastAPI BadHost (CVSS 7.5). OWASP MCP Top 10. NIST AI RMF.

crm_erp.enterprise: Agentic ERP/CRM (MS Dynamics). 4 integration methods, 9 key endpoints. Top 3 stall reasons: exec accountability, data integrity, no remediation.

product_design.ux: AI-driven research. 7 patterns: disclosure, onboarding, defaults, gesture, micro-interactions, dark mode, adaptive. Generative UI emerging.

data_ai.pipelines: AI pipelines: feature eng, training, deployment, monitoring. Real-time the norm. Agentic pipelines. Production LLM: multi-model, caching, guardrails. Vibe era over.

database.postgresql: Index-only scans top optimization. 8 anti-patterns cause most incidents. BRIN indexes underutilized. Zero-downtime migrations baseline.
database.redis: Cache-Aside dominant. Singleflight for stampede prevention. Hot-key mitigation. Consistent hashing before Cluster.

kubernetes.prod_patterns: FinOps first-class. Multi-cloud optimization. GitOps maturity. Gateway API replacing Ingress. Serverless-K8s hybrid.

practitioner_lessons: Amazon: 261% incident increase from AI codegen without review infra
CRM rollouts stall from exec gaps, not tech
cross_domain: CRM success needs org + tech maturity
